calendar.matters:
Amended Peition To Enforce Investigative Subpoena
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Perry P. Poff, Esq., Melgoza & Scates LLP (916) 624-4551 Attorney for Respondent, D'Arcy and Harty Construction

Counsel for defendant stipultes to Judge Pro Tem deciding today's motion.

Motion is not contested. No argument is held. Mr. Poff makes an appearance to address the issues of sanctions asked for in his prayer for relief.

The court makes the following ruling:

PETITIONER DIVISION OF OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH'S Peition To Enforce Investigative Subpoena is taken under submission to modify Court's tentative ruling to address Defendant's request for sanctions which were not addressed in Court's tentative ruling.

Judge Pro Tem: Philip Ward; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
